---
title: "08 - Combining Datasets"
date: 2024-05-29
description: "This notebook explains how to append and merge data sets."
categories: [econ 490, stata, merge, append, m:m, m:1, 1:m]
---

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=08_Merge_Append.html">

If you are not redirected automatically, [click here](08_Merge_Append.html).
